song.title: Search Me O God
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Search me, O God, my actions try, And let my life appear As seen by Thine all-searching eye— To mine my ways make clear.
[V2] 2) Search all my sense, and know my heart Who only canst make known, And let the deep, the hidden part To me be fully shown.
[V3] 3) Throw light into the darkened cells, Where passion reigns within; Quicken my conscience till it feels The loathsomeness of sin.
[V4] 4) Search all my thoughts, the secret springs, The motives that control; The chambers where polluted things Hold empire o’er the soul.
[V5] 5) Search, till Thy fiery glance has cast Its holy light through all, And I by grace am brought at last Before Thy face to fall.
[V6] 6) Thus prostrate I shall learn of Thee, What now I feebly prove, That God alone in Christ can be Unutterable love.
song.author: Frank Bottome
